channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-08
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire has shifted global perceptions of the US, while ongoing conflicts in Lebanon and Nigeria highlight regional instability.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-08
item.description: Oil prices fell sharply while stocks rose following a conditional ceasefire announcement between the US and Iran, though shipping impacts remain limited.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-08
item.description: Google's Gemini introduces notebooks for project organization, while Meta reenters the AI space with a new model called Muse Spark.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-08
item.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder secured the No. 1 seed in the NBA playoffs, while Scottie Scheffler and Bryson DeChambeau make headlines at the Masters.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-08
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a new lunar crater, insights into proton movement, and breakthroughs in male contraception and brain mapping.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-07
item.description: A two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran has been established, impacting global perceptions and oil markets.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-07
item.description: The oil and gas crisis stemming from the Iran war is deemed more severe than previous crises, while unemployment remains high among skilled workers in Washington, DC.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-07
item.description: Amazon will end support for older Kindle devices starting May 20, 2026, impacting users' ability to access new content.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-07
item.description: The Colorado Avalanche clinched the Central Division title and the top seed in the Western Conference, while a brawl erupted in an MLB game between the Angels and Braves.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-07
item.description: Recent scientific breakthroughs include advanced brain mapping techniques, discoveries in male contraception, and insights into brain health and aging.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-06
item.description: Tensions escalate as Trump issues an ultimatum to Iran while violence continues in Gaza, highlighting ongoing geopolitical instability.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-06
item.description: The ongoing war in Iran is driving profits for oil and defense companies while raising concerns about rising consumer prices and economic stability.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-06
item.description: Wisconsin governor vetoed a bill for porn age verification, while NASA's Artemis II astronauts set a new distance record from Earth.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-06
item.description: Michigan secured its second NCAA basketball title, defeating UConn, while the Spurs' Victor Wembanyama exited a game due to injury.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-06
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into ancient ecosystems, the origins of life, and new understandings of consciousness and health.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-05
item.description: The rescue of a US airman in Iran has significant implications for US military operations, while Hungary faces election-related tensions and violence continues in Ukraine.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-05
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East is causing significant volatility in oil markets, impacting prices and economic expectations globally.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-05
item.description: AI music platform Suno faces challenges with copyright issues, while Google Maps' Gemini feature receives positive feedback for planning assistance.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-05
item.description: UCLA celebrates its first women's NCAA championship while Luka Doncic seeks treatment for his hamstring injury ahead of the NBA playoffs.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-05
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries include a protein linked to brain aging, new insights into language evolution, and a potential breakthrough in cancer treatment.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: A mixed sentiment surrounds global events, including violence in Ukraine and New York, while notable developments occur in military regulations and international arrests.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: US job growth exceeded expectations in March, but rising prices and geopolitical tensions are raising concerns about economic stability.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: AI-generated content raises copyright concerns as a folk musician faces unauthorized uploads of her songs.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: Michigan and UConn advance to the NCAA championship game, while Jo Adell's defensive heroics secure a win for the Angels.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: Recent scientific advancements include a new blood pressure treatment, breakthroughs in understanding fear and PTSD, and the discovery of ancient life forms.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: Rescue efforts in Iran for a US crew member face significant challenges, while Hungary prepares for a pivotal election against Viktor Orban's long-standing leadership.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: The US jobs market showed positive growth in March, but concerns remain over the impact of rising oil prices and corporate fee increases.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: Anthropic's new policy significantly increases costs for users of OpenClaw with Claude AI, while other tech developments include NASA fixing an Outlook glitch and OpenAI's CEO taking medical leave.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: Geno Auriemma criticized officiating after UConn's loss, while UCLA reached its first NCAA title game and Cooper Flagg became the youngest player with a 50-point NBA game.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: Recent scientific advancements include a gene therapy for deafness, insights into aging and immune response, and a new microwave technique for healthier fries.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: The ongoing war in Iran is causing significant economic distress and impacting global supply chains, while political tensions in the US and Europe continue to rise.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital limited withdrawals amid investor concerns over the unregulated lending market.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: Archive of Our Own exits beta after 17 years, while Granola app raises privacy concerns over note-sharing settings.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a crash, while Luka Doncic's injury raises concerns for the NBA playoffs.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, alongside significant discoveries in health, archaeology, and environmental science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck off Indonesia, while Israel escalates attacks in Lebanon amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: NASA successfully launched the Artemis II mission, marking a significant step toward returning humans to the Moon.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: Puka Nacua enters rehab amid legal issues, while Tiger Woods receives permission to seek treatment abroad and the NCAA considers new eligibility rules for athletes.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from microbial insights in colon cancer to the evolutionary history of squid, highlighting diverse advancements in understanding health and biology.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: Iran is reportedly using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, raising serious humanitarian concerns.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various tech products, while new AI developments continue to emerge in the technology sector.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the U.S. soccer team struggles with a loss to Portugal.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into asteroids, blood pressure management, evolutionary biology, and the behavior of materials, highlighting ongoing advancements in various fields.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: Spain has closed its airspace to US aircraft involved in the Iran war, following a denial of military base access to the US.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: Brent crude oil prices surged to $116 a barrel amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, while US stock markets continued to decline for the fifth consecutive week.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: Rec Room, a competitor to Roblox, is shutting down despite having over 150 million users and a peak valuation of $3.5 billion.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: The Final Four for Women's March Madness is set with Texas and South Carolina advancing, while the NBA sees significant player developments and challenges in officiating.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into sleep's impact on health, the effectiveness of non-drug therapies for arthritis, and new cosmic phenomena.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran continues to escalate, impacting regional stability and prompting various international responses.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: US churches are increasingly developing affordable housing on underutilized land as border businesses suffer from reduced Canadian tourism amid rising oil prices and economic challenges.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: AI continues to influence various sectors, including music and social media, while ongoing sales events highlight consumer technology trends.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: UConn's dramatic last-second victory over Duke secured their place in the Final Four, while the NFL faces challenges with referee negotiations and player trades.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: New research reveals potential health risks of erythritol, while breakthroughs in pain therapy and human origins reshape scientific understanding.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran and recent violence in Lebanon highlight escalating tensions in the region, while a tragic migrant incident off Greece raises humanitarian concerns.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: US border businesses face challenges as Canadian tourists decline, while the stock market continues to struggle amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: Suno's latest AI music model update emphasizes user customization, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale attracts shoppers with various deals.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: Arizona and Illinois advance to the Final Four, while the USMNT faces a setback against Belgium in World Cup preparations.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant health risks from sugar substitutes, advancements in carbon capture technology, and new insights into human evolution and animal behavior.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: Nepal's former Prime Minister was arrested following a deadly protest crackdown, while global tensions rise with Iran and North Korea's military ties.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: Sony has suspended sales of its memory cards due to shortages, while various tech products are on sale during the Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: Tiger Woods was arrested for DUI following a car crash, while college basketball teams advance in the NCAA tournament.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into human origins, bee nutrition, and the effects of Mars dust storms on water loss.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Ukraine seeks drone deals amid rising tensions, while African nations face oil supply disruptions and various legal and political issues unfold globally.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: US markets experienced significant declines amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while rising energy costs impact various sectors and consumer services.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Anthropic temporarily blocked a Pentagon ban while Apple discontinues the Mac Pro and introduces new AI features for Siri.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Purdue advances to the Elite 8 in March Madness, while MLB Opening Day features record strikeouts and notable player performances.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries highlight the intelligence of animals, the complexities of sleep, and advancements in understanding diseases and potential extraterrestrial life.
